operate_date.text: ระหว่างวันที่

as_notbook.text: รวมปิดบัญชี

acc_super.text: ชื่อผู้รับรองคนที่ 1

acc_super_position.text: ตำแหน่งผู้รับรองคนที่ 1

manager_name.text: ชื่อผู้รับรองคนที่ 2

manager_name_position.text: ตำแหน่งผู้รับรองคนที่ 2

root.sql: select tab.* from ( select sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_name, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount, ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = '!acc_super_1!' ) as acc_super , '!acc_super_position_1!' as acc_super_position , ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = '!manager_name_1!' ) as manager_name , '!manager_name_position_1!' as manager_name_position , --( select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as manager_name, ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'SD MONTH พ.ศ YYYY') as operate_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'MONTH YYYY') as acc_month from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id and ( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ union all select '' as account_id, '' as account_name, '3.1' as account_group_id, 'รวมหนี้สินและทุน' as account_group_name, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb) as dr_bb, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb) as cr_bb, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between) as dr_between, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between) as cr_between, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount) as dr_amount, sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount) as cr_amount, '' as acc_super , '' as acc_super_position , '' as manager_name , '' as manager_name_position , '' as coop_name , '' as operate_tdate, '' as acc_month from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id and sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id in ('2','3') and ( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount > 0 ) )tab order by account_group_id , account_id

r_accsheet_105_mem_nest_sum.sql:
select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount , sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, '!operate_date_2!' as operate_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'SD MONTH พ.ศ YYYY') as operate_tdate, pka_rep_acc.fp_get_income('1','Y', '!operate_date_1!' , '!operate_date_2!' ) as income from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id
and ( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount > 0 ) and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id in ('4','5') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id

r_accsheet_105_mem_nest_mem.sql:
SELECT tab.monthly_date , tab.mem_bf , tab.mem_new , tab.mem_fw , tab.mem_loan , ( tab.mem_resign + tab.mem_fire + tab.mem_dead + tab.mem_tran ) AS mem_resign_all
FROM ( select ( select sum( cm.mem_bf ) from sc_cls_mem cm where cm.mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_bf , ( select sum( cm.mem_new ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_new , ( select sum( cm.mem_resign ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_resign , ( select sum( cm.mem_fired ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_fire , ( select sum( cm.mem_dead ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_dead , ( select sum( cm.mem_tran ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_tran , ( select sum( cm.mem_fw ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code in ( '01' , '02' ) and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_fw , ( select sum( cm.mem_fw ) from sc_cls_mem cm where mem_type_code = 'LN' and cm.monthly_date = sc_cls_mem.monthly_date ) AS mem_loan , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( monthly_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') AS monthly_date
from sc_cls_mem where monthly_date = '!operate_date_2!'
) tab
